馬鞍山：87k、807A、807K、807C
大水坑：289K

學生活動中心設置物資站，唯現存物資如長傘、水、急救物資皆短缺

To Whom it may concern:
Hong Kong is under unrest since June. Hong Kong government and Hong Kong Police Force (HKPF) are violating human rights which abided by the Basic Law.
As widely claimed by the government that HK people deserve and enjoy a high degree of freedom, however, what have been seen in recent months are totally the opposite. HKPF wantonly deploys excessive unnecessary force to arrest the subdued demonstrators. They are seen emotionally out of control and their behaviors are highly provocative during their duty.
Today, they have been firing teargas and rubber bullets restlessly inside various campuses of universities, mainly including,The Chinese University of Hong Kong City University of Hong Kong, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University.
The Chinese University of Hong Kong is already bombarded since yesterday 11 Nov and those riot police are charging into the campus without any warranty, such act is totally infringing the law. Excessive forces are also used to intrude school campus where many students are injured neglecting safety of the public.
Hong Kong people is in line with the rest of civilized world fighting for basic human rights and many students are US passport holders. May the embassy offer humanitarian aid to the injured and suppressed students.

Thank you.
Regards,
